diagrams.title: sigprocmask() Function Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how sigprocmask() interacts with process signal mask and pending signals
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how signals are blocked/unblocked and delivered through sigprocmask()

diagrams.title: Signal Set Operations (Venn Diagram)
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of SIG_BLOCK, SIG_UNBLOCK, and SIG_SETMASK operations
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing the difference between the three how parameters for sigprocmask()

diagrams.title: Signal Lifecycle Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows complete lifecycle of a signal from generation to delivery with masking
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where sigprocmask() intervention affects signal delivery
